title: Pinch-pot cactus planter trio
notes: Three pinch-pot planters in different shapes: squat round (50 mm tall, 70 mm wide), tall cylinder (80 mm tall, 50 mm diameter), and a slightly flared bowl shape (40 mm tall, 80 mm wide). Drainage hole pressed in each base before drying. PVA sealed inside and out for water resistance. Suitable for small succulents and cacti.
